text:
Created attachment 162391
patch with update to 0.11.2

Hello,

attached a patch to update the port to the current version 0.11.2. While there:
- recreate patches with make makepatch
- remove PORTREVISION=0
- rework the COMMENT a little
-> short: make portlint happy

Greetings,
Torsten
